records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vWe can't help it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vWe can't help it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vWe can't help it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use the smokescreens and retreat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use the smokescreens and retreat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use the smokescreens and retreat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where do you think you're going?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where do you think you're going?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where do you think you're going?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... Um, w-well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... Um, w-well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... Um, w-well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Did you say... plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Did you say... plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Did you say... plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Yes?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Yes?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Yes?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go back to the Academy right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go back to the Academy right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go back to the Academy right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... have a lot of questions, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... have a lot of questions, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... have a lot of questions, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sh-shut it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sh-shut it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sh-shut it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um! Wait!
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um! Wait!
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um! Wait!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't get to thank you yet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't get to thank you yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't get to thank you yet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the rush, young man?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the rush, young man?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the rush, young man?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that. That's why we're in this state.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that. That's why we're in this state.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that. That's why we're in this state.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't like it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't like it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't like it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know that's not it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know that's not it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know that's not it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she wants it or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she wants it or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she wants it or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Discard...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Discard...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Discard...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, special surveillance means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, special surveillance means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, special surveillance means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...
records.m_Talk_DEU: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...
records.m_Talk_FRA: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...

records.m_Talk_ENG: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has it gained self-consciousness?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has it gained self-consciousness?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has it gained self-consciousness?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is all hypothetical.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is all hypothetical.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is all hypothetical.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, she's just a victim!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, she's just a victim!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, she's just a victim!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sustain her life and seal it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sustain her life and seal it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sustain her life and seal it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Krgh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Krgh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Krgh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
records.m_Talk_DEU: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
records.m_Talk_FRA: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,

records.m_Talk_ENG: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
records.m_Talk_DEU: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
records.m_Talk_FRA: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Don't make me laugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Don't make me laugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the Remains are no match against the Sealing Chain.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vWe can't help it.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vWe can't help it.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vWe can't help it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Department of Philosophy. Mission to retrieve the Fragment failed. Retreating back to the operation point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Use the smokescreens and retreat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Use the smokescreens and retreat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Use the smokescreens and retreat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where do you think you're going?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where do you think you're going?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where do you think you're going?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Cough!* *Cough!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey, what's with the smokescreens? They could've just run away!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... Um, w-well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... Um, w-well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... Um, w-well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mind me. It was part of the plan to let them go anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Did you say... plan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Did you say... plan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Did you say... plan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing you should be concerned about. But you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Yes?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Yes?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Yes?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go back to the Academy right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go back to the Academy right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go back to the Academy right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go back and tell the chairwoman everything that just happened in detail, then ask for protection.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, don't you ever think about setting foot outside of school grounds for a while, you hear me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Counter Academy is the safest place to be in Ground One, right after the Administration headquarters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The old chap said that <color=#ffd34c>this is as far as we go</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... have a lot of questions, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... have a lot of questions, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... have a lot of questions, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How did you know I transferred to the Academy? That's only something my friends know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sh-shut it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sh-shut it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sh-shut it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, just do as I say or you might regret it later!

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um! Wait!
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um! Wait!
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um! Wait!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't get to thank you yet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't get to thank you yet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't get to thank you yet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really don't know how to treat a lady, eh? Kid Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Sir Burnett knew that his grandson was a sucker, he'd turn over in his grave!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop making fun of me! You rotten old chap!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's either kid or Burnett! But not both!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah! I'll let you know my decision after seeing how you do, kid Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it. I'm done talking to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? How'd the operation go? What's the next move?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's the rush, young man?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's the rush, young man?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's the rush, young man?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you already know, after Regina MacCready became President, there was a massive purge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you shouldn't corner a rat too much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because if they have nothing to lose, they are bound to act recklessly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know that. That's why we're in this state.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know that. That's why we're in this state.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know that. That's why we're in this state.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. We got a signal. The transmitter you put on them is working well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You might not know how to treat a lady, but you've become more familiar with agent gear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the rat goes into its hole, we follow them to the Department of Philosophy's base and make a sweeping arrest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's with the sour face, kid Burnett?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't like it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't like it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't like it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get why we're cleaning out the rump of that group, because someone has to do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that Liona girl, will she be all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, she didn't even realise she was handling a Fragment of the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this what you were thinking about? You're not bringing personal feelings to the mission, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know that's not it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know that's not it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know that's not it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What difference does it make if you tell that child <color=#ffd34c>the truth about the world</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sometimes, ignorance is bliss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she finds out that it's a Fragment of the Demon Lord, it will shake her world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she wants it or not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she wants it or not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she wants it or not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? We just leave her like that? Didn't you say she was under <color=#ffd34c>special surveillance</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you're misunderstanding what special surveillance means.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution isn't a group of people that brings justice like you think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We search for and safekeep unknown Artifacts, and if that is impossible, we discard them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Discard...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Discard...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Discard...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, special surveillance means...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, special surveillance means...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, special surveillance means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Special surveillance No. 17... Name, <color=#ffd34c>Liona Hartt</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A few years ago, she and her friends got into a freak accident while on the bus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...
root.m_Talk_DEU: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...
root.m_Talk_FRA: On the surface, the incident was reported as a Corruption disaster...

root.m_Talk_ENG: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but the truth is that the incident occurred because the Fragment the Society was researching had an outburst during transportation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Originally, the incident could've ended up with ten times the casualties, but Liona stopped it on her own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in return, the Fragment gained self-consciousness by consuming her memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, Liona Hartt's life depends on that Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Has it gained self-consciousness?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Has it gained self-consciousness?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Has it gained self-consciousness?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Lake of Knowledge is... one and all. All and one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, Gha'agsheblah is a Demon Lord, but also a hive of information.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But think back to the colossal Fragment that was sealed in LAKE-4.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how massive the hive is, we call it a "Fragment," not a Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, you're telling me that a Fragment that gains self-consciousness... can become a Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is all hypothetical.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is all hypothetical.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is all hypothetical.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, it is a plausible hypothesis if it's a hive rather than a single entity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? She's like that because she got caught up in the accident, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, she's just a victim!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, she's just a victim!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, she's just a victim!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's done nothing wrong, but she's under surveillance until she dies because she might turn into a Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Until she dies? Who said anything about waiting until her death, kid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be become a problem if she dies. It's highly likely the connected Fragment will cause another outburst.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the Fragment shows any signs of an outburst, we will immediately sustain her life and seal it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So she never wakes up. With that Sealing Chain you're holding at that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sustain her life and seal it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sustain her life and seal it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sustain her life and seal it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh, old chap! How's that any different from putting her into a vegetable state?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'm gonna cooperate with something as crazy as that?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what else can you do for Liona Hartt?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to force her and the Fragment apart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what if the Fragment has an outburst? Will you take responsibility for the hundreds and thousands of lives it kills?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Krgh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Krgh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Krgh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to be recognized by the Institution, stop your daydreaming, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
root.m_Talk_DEU: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
root.m_Talk_FRA: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,

root.m_Talk_ENG: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
root.m_Talk_DEU: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
root.m_Talk_FRA: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Enjoying her ordinary days until the Fragment has an outburst.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is where the Institution's care for Liona Hartt <color=#ffd34c>stops</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Don't make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Don't make me laugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Don't make me laugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...! That's just a coward's excuse...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I agree, kid. But it is also the cold harsh truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least, that is the truth about the current state of the Institution.
